title: Inventory AI And Specials Modules
summary: Current-state inventory of source-only metadata for the eighteen committed src/ai/ and src/specials/ TypeScript modules that model the vanilla DOOM monster-AI and sector/line-special surface: monster attack actions, boss specials, chase navigation, melee/missile range predicates, sound propagation, pain/death state transitions, line-of-sight targeting, vertical-plane thinkers (doors, ceilings, floors, platforms), line triggers, switches, sector specials, stairs/donut builders, animations, and active-special snapshot/restore plumbing, without embedding proprietary WAD bytes.
evidence_method: inventory lane local repository audit using git ls-files-compatible Bun.Glob scans, sha256sum-equivalent SHA-256 fingerprints, src/ai/, src/specials/, test/ai/, test/specials/, reference/manifests/vanilla-limit-summary.json, reference/manifests/source-catalog.json Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 anchors, and package.json Bun script context.

modules.role: Implements monster A_*Attack action functions (zombie/shotgun/chaingunner/imp/demon/cacodemon/cyberdemon/baron/revenant/archvile/mancubus/lost-soul/pain-elemental) plus shared face-target and tracer helpers via injected line-attack, aim, spawn-mobj, try-move, damage, radius-attack, and start-sound callbacks.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_enemy.c A_FaceTarget, A_PosAttack, A_SPosAttack, A_CPosAttack, A_BspiAttack, A_TroopAttack, A_SargAttack, A_HeadAttack, A_CyberAttack, A_BruisAttack, A_SkelMissile, A_Tracer, A_VileChase/A_VileAttack, A_FatRaise/A_FatAttack1-3, A_SkullAttack, and A_PainAttack monster attack behavior.

modules.role: Implements boss-only A_*Death/A_*Spit/A_*Spawn/A_*Brain/A_*Hoof/A_*Metal action functions and tracks the brain spitter target list and rotating spawn type table for the icon-of-sin finale.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_enemy.c A_KeenDie, A_PainDie, A_BossDeath, A_BrainAwake, A_BrainPain, A_BrainScream, A_BrainExplode, A_BrainDie, A_BrainSpit, A_SpawnSound, A_SpawnFly, and A_Hoof/A_Metal/A_BabyMetal boss action behavior.

modules.role: Implements monster chase navigation (A_Chase, P_Move, P_TryWalk, P_NewChaseDir) including direction tables, float-mode bobbing, friction, special-line activation, and door/lift opening through injected callbacks.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_enemy.c A_Chase, P_Move, P_TryWalk, P_NewChaseDir, and float-mode and door-bumping monster navigation behavior.

modules.role: Re-exports the canonical melee-range predicate and pins the MELEERANGE/MELEE_RADIUS_ADJUST/MELEE_BASE_CUTOFF fixed-point constants used by P_CheckMeleeRange.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_enemy.c MELEERANGE constant and P_CheckMeleeRange melee distance check behavior.

modules.role: Re-exports the canonical missile-range predicate and the MISSILE_BASE_CUTOFF/MISSILE_NO_MELEE_CUTOFF/MISSILE_DIST_CLAMP/MISSILE_CYBORG_DIST_CLAMP/MISSILE_VILE_DIST_MAX/MISSILE_UNDEAD_DIST_MIN fixed-point constants used by P_CheckMissileRange.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_enemy.c P_CheckMissileRange per-monster-class missile range and refire-probability behavior.

modules.role: Implements monster-alert sound propagation through the linedef graph respecting ML_SOUNDBLOCK and ML_TWOSIDED, building the SoundState with valid/lastsound counters used by P_NoiseAlert.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_enemy.c P_RecursiveSound, P_NoiseAlert sector-graph sound propagation and ML_SOUNDBLOCK two-segment cutoff behavior.

modules.role: Implements shared pain/death A_Pain, A_Scream, A_XScream, A_PlayerScream, A_Fall, and A_Explode action functions that monsters and the player share for damage feedback and gib transitions.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_enemy.c A_Pain, A_Scream, A_XScream, A_PlayerScream, A_Fall, and A_Explode pain/death state transition behavior.

modules.role: Implements line-of-sight P_CheckSight (BSP traversal with reject lump bypass), P_LookForPlayers all-around scan, and the canonical P_CheckMeleeRange/P_CheckMissileRange predicates with per-monster-class refire probabilities.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_enemy.c P_CheckSight, P_LookForPlayers, P_CheckMeleeRange, and P_CheckMissileRange line-of-sight, target acquisition, and refire-probability behavior.

modules.role: Provides snapshot/restore plumbing for the active platform list, active ceiling list, and button list so save/load and demo replay can reconstruct in-flight specials thinkers without regenerating sector-state.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_saveg.c P_ArchiveSpecials/P_UnArchiveSpecials and the activeplats/activeceilings/buttonlist arrays referenced from p_plats.c, p_ceilng.c, and p_switch.c.

modules.role: Defines the canonical wall and flat animation table (BLODGR1, SLADRIP1, BLODRIP1, FIREWALA, GSTFONT1, FIRELAVA, FIREMAG1, FIREBLU1, ROCKRED1, NUKAGE1, FWATER1, SWATER1, LAVA1, BLOOD1) and tics the texture/flat translation arrays once per gametic.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_spec.c animdefs[]/anims[] table, P_InitPicAnims, and P_UpdateSpecials per-frame texture and flat translation behavior.

modules.role: Implements ceiling thinker (T_MoveCeiling) for slow/fast/crush/raise-to-highest/lower-to-floor types, the active-ceilings list with crush stop and stasis activation, and EV_DoCeiling/EV_CeilingCrushStop event entry points.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_ceilng.c T_MoveCeiling, EV_DoCeiling, EV_CeilingCrushStop, P_ActivateInStasisCeiling, and the activeceilings list ceiling-thinker behavior.

modules.role: Implements vertical-door thinker (T_VerticalDoor) for normal/blaze open/close/raise-in-5-mins/close-in-30 types, EV_DoDoor/EV_DoLockedDoor/EV_VerticalDoor event entry points, locked-door key checks, and the canonical PlaneMoveResult enum reused by ceilings/floors/platforms/stairs.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_doors.c T_VerticalDoor, EV_DoDoor, EV_DoLockedDoor, EV_VerticalDoor, P_SpawnDoorCloseIn30, P_SpawnDoorRaiseIn5Mins, and the door-key/blue/red/yellow card check behavior.

modules.role: Implements floor thinker (T_MoveFloor) for lower-to-highest/lowest, raise-to-nearest/lowest-ceiling/24/512, crusher floors, and turbo lowering, plus EV_DoFloor event entry point and adjacent-sector floor matching helpers used by stairs.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_floor.c T_MoveFloor, EV_DoFloor, P_FindNextHighestFloor/P_FindLowestFloorSurrounding/P_FindHighestFloorSurrounding floor-thinker behavior.

modules.role: Routes P_CrossSpecialLine/P_ShootSpecialLine/P_UseSpecialLine activation through the canonical line-special table, dispatching to door, ceiling, floor, platform, stairs, donut, switch, exit, and teleport handlers and gating monster activation by special id.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_spec.c P_CrossSpecialLine, P_ShootSpecialLine, and P_UseSpecialLine line-special activation dispatch behavior.

modules.role: Implements platform thinker (T_PlatRaise) for perpetual raise, down-wait-up-stay, raise-to-nearest, and toggle types, the active-plats list with stasis support, and EV_DoPlat/EV_StopPlat/P_ActivateInStasis event entry points.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_plats.c T_PlatRaise, EV_DoPlat, EV_StopPlat, P_ActivateInStasis, and the activeplats list platform-thinker behavior.

modules.role: Implements P_PlayerInSpecialSector damage tics, secret bonus, exit damage, and the END/SUPER damage triggers gated by IRONFEET powerup and god-mode, scheduled per gametic on the player's current sector.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_spec.c P_PlayerInSpecialSector and P_UpdateSpecials level-end/secret-bonus/per-tick damage sector behavior.

modules.role: Implements EV_BuildStairs (8/16-unit step heights) and EV_DoDonut (paired pillar/pool floor moves) by building chained floor thinkers across adjacent sectors with matching texture, plus the donut speed and stair-build-speed constants.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_floor.c EV_BuildStairs and EV_DoDonut multi-sector adjacency-walk floor-build behavior.

modules.role: Implements the alphabetical switch texture pair list (alphSwitchList), per-game-mode switch list initialization, the active-button list with timed reset, P_StartButton, P_ChangeSwitchTexture, and the per-tic button update path.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_switch.c alphSwitchList, P_InitSwitchList, P_StartButton, P_ChangeSwitchTexture, and the buttonlist[]/BUTTONTIME button-thinker behavior.

test_coverage.notes: test/ai/ covers boss-specials brain spitter and rotating spawn types, chase-direction tables and float-mode bobbing, melee/missile range predicates with per-class refire probability, monster A_*Attack actions including hitscan, projectile, and fire-vile chains, line-of-sight and reject-bypass sound propagation, pain/death/explode state transitions, and target acquisition with all-around scan; test/specials/ covers active-specials snapshot/restore parity, animation translation tics, ceiling/door/floor/platform thinkers including crush stop and stasis, line-cross/use/shoot dispatch, sector damage tics, stairs/donut adjacency walks, and the switch texture pair list with button list timing.

reference_manifest_status.notes: Manifest alignment records the vanilla MAXCEILINGS/MAXPLATS/MAXBUTTONS/MAXSWITCHES/MAXANIMS active-list ceilings, the BUTTONTIME=35 reset window, and the canonical Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_enemy.c/p_spec.c umbrella source files that the AI and specials modules model; this inventory does not embed WAD bytes or proprietary game data.

ai_and_specials_boundary_status.notes: src/ai/ owns monster A_*Attack and pain/death state actions, chase navigation, melee and missile range predicates, line-of-sight checks, sound propagation, and boss specials; src/specials/ owns the vertical-plane thinkers (doors, ceilings, floors, platforms, stairs/donut), line-cross/use/shoot dispatch, switch buttons, animations, sector damage tics, and the snapshot/restore plumbing for save/load and demo replay. Both subsystems accept world- and player-side callbacks (P_LineAttack, P_AimLineAttack, P_SpawnMobj, P_TryMove, P_RadiusAttack, P_TeleportMove, P_DamageMobj, P_StartSound, P_UseSpecialLine, set_mobj_state) through injected context records so they can be unit-tested without the full collision, audio, and renderer subsystems.

implications: src/specials/doors.ts is the broadest export surface and highest reuse footprint in the specials lane (three const enums including the canonical PlaneMoveResult, seventeen constants including the door key prompts, the VerticalDoor thinker class, and 5 src/ + 9 test importers); the ceilings, floors, platforms, and stairsDonut modules all import PlaneMoveResult and the SFX_DOROPN/SFX_DORCLS/SFX_BDOPN/SFX_BDCLS sound ids from doors.ts, so any reshape of the PlaneMoveResult enum or door-event entry points is a cross-lane breaking change that the specials, save, audio, and player gameplay lanes must absorb together.

src/ai/targeting.ts is the broadest reuse footprint in the AI lane (5 src/ importers and 4 test importers); it owns the canonical line-of-sight P_CheckSight and the per-monster-class missile-range distance constants used by chase.ts, attacks.ts, bossSpecials.ts, meleeRange.ts, and missileRange.ts. Any change to the TargetingContext interface or the MISSILE_*_DIST constants is a cross-AI breaking change that all monster-action modules must absorb together.

Monster attack and boss-specials modules (src/ai/attacks.ts, src/ai/bossSpecials.ts, src/ai/stateTransitions.ts) accept world- and player-side callbacks (P_LineAttack, P_AimLineAttack, P_SpawnMobj, P_SpawnMissile, P_TryMove, P_DamageMobj, P_RadiusAttack, P_TeleportMove, P_RemoveMobj, set_mobj_state, P_StartSound, P_PainShootSkull, P_LookForPlayers, A_Chase, EV_DoDoor, EV_DoFloor) through injected MonsterAttackContext, BossSpecialsContext, and StateTransitionContext records, so the launch and gameplay lanes must wire those callbacks at startup before A_*Attack/A_*Death/A_BrainSpit/A_VileChase fire; phase 08 follow-ups (08-009 implement-zombie-attacks through 08-018 implement-boss-death-specials, plus 08-030 gate-monster-ai-semantics) depend on this wiring.

src/specials/activeSpecials.ts owns the snapshot/restore plumbing for the active-plats, active-ceilings, and button lists used by save/load and demo replay; it imports from ceilings.ts, platforms.ts, and switches.ts and is itself imported only by the (forthcoming) save subsystem, so any reshape of the snapshot record formats is a cross-lane breaking change that the specials and save lanes must absorb together. The ButtonListSnapshot, ActivePlatsSnapshot, and ActiveCeilingsSnapshot types are the contract that p_saveg.c parity gates depend on.

src/specials/lineTriggers.ts pins the MONSTER_CROSS_SPECIALS=[39, 97, 125, 126, 4, 10, 88], MONSTER_USE_SPECIALS=[1, 32, 33, 34], MONSTER_SHOOT_SPECIALS=[46], and NON_TRIGGER_PROJECTILE_TYPES=[ROCKET, PLASMA, BFG, TROOPSHOT, HEADSHOT, BRUISERSHOT] tables that govern monster activation of line specials in vanilla DOOM; downstream parity tests must keep these arrays pinned to the Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 defaults until a Dehacked subsystem permits monster-trigger reconfiguration.

MELEERANGE=64*FRACUNIT and MISSILERANGE=32*64*FRACUNIT appear independently in src/ai/attacks.ts and src/ai/meleeRange.ts (and MISSILE_BASE_CUTOFF/MISSILE_NO_MELEE_CUTOFF/MISSILE_DIST_CLAMP/MISSILE_CYBORG_DIST_CLAMP/MISSILE_VILE_DIST_MAX/MISSILE_UNDEAD_DIST_MIN in src/ai/targeting.ts) — these are the canonical per-monster-class refire-distance constants from vanilla p_enemy.c P_CheckMissileRange; downstream gates must keep both copies pinned to the same Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 values.
